The Wang Report Take

No manual Wang Report editorial on file for this vendor. The numbers read as follows:
One in four CVEs is critical. That’s not a distribution — it’s a warning sign. Trend data not yet in the schema. Neutral placeholder. Within the top quartile. Competitive. That’s the file.
— The Wang Report

(80×0.30) + (100×0.25) + (100×0.20) + (33×0.15) + (50×0.10) = 71 → GRADE B

Incident Behaviour

The scorecard part no algorithm produces.
No incident behaviour rating. The Wang Report assigns these only after a publicly documented incident.
